uplink.description: PLUS sensor message (upstream example input), temp 23.3 C / RH 51.9% / 815 ppm CO2, indices set
uplink._note: Input bytes verbatim from the upstream inbiot-lora-codec PLUS example. Expected values authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js as oracle and mapping its output to normalized vocabulary keys (air.*) plus camelCase extras (ch2o->hcho, vIndex->ventilationIndex, tIndex->thermalIndex, dB->noise, counter->messageCounter).

uplink.description: PLUS sensor message (synthetic), temp 21.4 C / RH 47.2% / 640 ppm CO2, moldIndex calculated, audible noise 38 dBA
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds PLUS frame. Expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js over these bytes (oracle) and mapping its output to normalized keys.

uplink.description: PLUS sensor message (synthetic), temp 26.8 C / RH 61.8% / 1180 ppm CO2, moldIndex calculating, noise preheating
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds PLUS frame; noise byte 0xff yields the 'Preheating' sentinel (a string, matching upstream). Expected produced via the upstream oracle, mapped to normalized keys.

uplink.description: Config message (leading byte 0x00) — not a sensor frame
uplink._note: Input bytes verbatim from the upstream device-configuration example; this codec only decodes the sensor message (0x01).

uplink.description: MINI sensor message — wrong device type for this PLUS codec
uplink._note: Input bytes verbatim from the upstream MINI sensor example; the PLUS codec rejects non-PLUS device-type strings.

uplink.description: Truncated sensor frame — too short for a PLUS payload
uplink._note: Synthetic short frame to exercise the length guard.
